question: Simulate gradient accumulation for batch_size=32 using 4 micro-batches of size 8. Accumulate gradients.
code_hint: loss.backward() accumulates, optimizer.step() with zero_grad applies
expected_output: Accumulated grad norm: similar to single batch
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

model = nn.Linear(10, 1)
optimizer = torch.optim.SGD(model.parameters(), lr=0.1)
micro_batch_size = 8
num_micro_batches = 4

for i in range(num_micro_batches):
    x = torch.randn(micro_batch_size, 10)
    y = torch.randn(micro_batch_size, 1)
    loss = model(x).mean()
    ???(loss).backward()

print(f"Accumulated grad norm: {model.weight.grad.norm().item():.4f}")
